criterion_source: C6 § 7 has no pilot for Abl/Gen. Gen-absolute candidate≠construction is a limit, not a kill-gate threshold.
blocking_note: H1612 freeze probe: C6 programme kill-gate MISSING for SG-SE-004 (sem-a-genitive (+ Abl); not a § 7 pilot). C6 § 7 has no pilot for Abl/Gen. Gen-absolute candidate≠construction is a limit, not a kill-gate threshold. Integrity re-derive against pin 04e0778: PASS. Not inventing a threshold; leave disposition=unknown. Path to freeze exit: programme adds a named gate, or human visa→published outside the probe-first kill path.
